provenance.derivation: frozen S8 ambient projection with its S5/S7 parents and O1 release bridge

exact_geometric_contract.rank3_boundary_plane_corner_locus: C3(U)={x in boundary |U| : incident local boundary-plane normal span has rank 3}
exact_geometric_contract.triangulation_artifact_firewall: coplanar subdivision vertices have normal rank 1 and straight edge subdivision vertices have rank at most 2
exact_geometric_contract.free_Euclidean_isometry_scope: isometries of H; any R4 extension away from H is quotient data and is not classified
exact_geometric_contract.orientation_policy: both determinant signs on W are enumerated; orientation-reversing does not mean a planar reflection

finite_reduction_theorem.corner_rigidity: every enumerated C3(U)-to-C3(V) isometry is Phi_g for a unique g in S4
finite_reduction_theorem.actual_shape_filter: Phi_g(|U|)=|V| iff the exact chamber mask satisfies gU=V
finite_reduction_theorem.tile_conclusion: free Euclidean congruence equals locked left-S4 equivalence on the 82-row carrier
finite_reduction_theorem.partition_conclusion: independently of tile corner rigidity, every cover union is the reference tetrahedron, whose full isometry group permutes its four extreme vertices and is exactly S4; hence partition congruence equals locked global-left cover equivalence
finite_reduction_theorem.bare_union_warning: the union of every exact cover is the same tetrahedron; the classified object is the set of pieces
